image_requests.prompt: Dramatic marble bust portrait of Roman Emperor Marcus Aurelius, extreme close-up, single warm candle flame lighting from lower-left casting deep chiaroscuro shadows, ancient stone texture visible, pitch black background, cinematic dramatic lighting, photorealistic hyper-detailed, stoic expression
image_requests.purpose: Full-bleed hero — the stoic candlelit stone face of the most powerful man in antiquity dominates the entire frame

html: HIS SECRET
why: The Cinzel typeface is literally modeled on Roman stone inscriptions — it is the only font on earth that belongs inside this image, and it makes 'HIS SECRET' feel carved rather than typed. The bust fills 100% of the frame: at 168×94 pixels on a phone, a stone face emerging from near-black darkness is one of the most visually arresting things a human eye can encounter while scrolling. Three overlays work in concert — a radial warm-amber screen-blend simulates candlelight without adding any literal element, a corner vignette pushes the eye inward to the face, and a bottom gradient ensures the white text is always legible regardless of how bright the generated image renders. The composition is deliberately monolithic: one face, two words, absolute darkness — because the whole premise of the video is that this man's most private thoughts survived in secret, and the thumbnail should feel like you just found them.
title: 40 Private Thoughts Marcus Aurelius Never Meant to Publish to Fall Asleep to
